'''ngowapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azacyclic|azacyclic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azacyclic|azacyclic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngowapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ngowapithi || ngowapiji || ngowapishi || ngowapiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ngowaputhu || ngowapuju || ngowapushu || ngowapuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ngowaputhu || ngowapuju || ngowapushu || ngowapuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ngowapufthuf || ngowapufjuf || ngowapufshuf || ngowapufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ngowapethe || ngowapeje || ngowapeshe || ngowapeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ngowapotho || ngowapojo || ngowaposho || ngowapoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ngowapotho || ngowapojo || ngowaposho || ngowapoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ngowapofthof || ngowapofjof || ngowapofshof || ngowapofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngowapïfthïf || ngowapïfjïf || ngowapïfshïf || ngowapïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngowapïfthïf || ngowapïfjïf || ngowapïfshïf || ngowapïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngowapïfthïf || ngowapïfjïf || ngowapïfshïf || ngowapïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngowapïfthïf || ngowapïfjïf || ngowapïfshïf || ngowapïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ngowapæthæ || ngowapæjæ || ngowapæshæ || ngowapækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ngowapatha || ngowapaja || ngowapasha || ngowapaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ngowapatha || ngowapaja || ngowapasha || ngowapaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ngowapafthaf || ngowapafjaf || ngowapafshaf || ngowapafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || ngowapasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || ngowapshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || ngowaproasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || ngowapmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || ngowapyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongowapnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongowapnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongowapnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongowapnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || ngowawapasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || ngowawapshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || ngowawaproasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || ngowawapmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || ngowawapyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongowawapnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongowawapnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongowawapnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongowawapnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || ngewæpasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || ngewæpshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || ngewæproasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || ngewæpmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || ngewæpyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongewæpnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongewæpnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongewæpnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongewæpnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || ngowfapasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || ngowfapshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || ngowfaproasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || ngowfapmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || ngowfapyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongowfapnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongowfapnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongowfapnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongowfapnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
